results.rendered_html: hanta—kāra m. the exclamation hanta (a partic. formula of benediction or salutation; also explained as 16 mouthfuls of alms, in  ŚBr.  among the four teats of the cow, Vāc.),  ŚBr. ;  PārGṛ. ;  Pur.
